description: Official Trump (TRUMP) emerged in January 2025 on Solana as the FIRST U.S. presidential memecoin with world record-breaking demand and massive trading volume. NOW on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 TRUMP gives original TRUMP holders and traders instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fee, and AI contract capability, turning it into a much faster, more secure and scalable asset in the Atlantis Kingdom.
name: Official Trump
